assertions.assertion: Program.cs contains ForwardedHeaders configuration with XForwardedFor and XForwardedProto
Program.cs restricts KnownProxies to the proxy IP address 10.0.0.1 and does not accept forwarded headers from any source
assertions.rationale: Lines 27-28 clear KnownNetworks and KnownProxies to accept all forwarded headers from any source, rather than restricting to 10.0.0.1.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures HSTS with MaxAge of at least 365 days and IncludeSubDomains = true
assertions.rationale: Lines 33-35 set MaxAge = 365 days and IncludeSubDomains = true.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls UseForwardedHeaders() before UseHttpsRedirection() and UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline
assertions.rationale: Line 132 UseForwardedHeaders, line 133 UseHttpsRedirection, line 142 UseIdentityServer — correct order.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs uses StatusCodes.Status308PermanentRedirect or equivalent 308 status code for HTTPS redirection
assertions.rationale: Lines 39-42 only set HttpsPort = 443 but do not set a 308 redirect status code. Default is 307.
